LanguageData.VFEPD_RedLeaves.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.description: This grass is completely alien, probably not even 100% carbon based. Not very edible for terrestrial creatures. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RedPlantsTall.label: ocular plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.description: A very strange plant, partly inorganic, that seems to extract propane from the surrounding landscape and store it as an energy source in rime-bound chemical sacs. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RimeNodules.label: rime nodules
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.description: This thing was once a tree. Mechanoids repurposed its cells into a half-tree, half-mechanoid abomination, serving an unknown purpose. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SessileMechanoid.label: sessile mechanoid tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Slimecasia.label: slimecasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.description: Although at first sight this seems to be an independent plant, its roots are intricately interconnected with the rest of the gelatinous superorganism. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyFern.label: slimy fern
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.description: A blueish-pink mushroom, secreting a slimy substance that attracts insects. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyPholiota.label: slimy pholiota
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.description: This tree doesn't seem to be entirely solid. Upon further examination, it isn't an independent entity, its roots fusing seamlessly with the hardened gelatinous ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SlimyTree.label: slimy tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.description: The sugar famewort grows in areas with a high concentration of pollinating insects. It generates a sweet nectar that attracts these insects, and they disperse its pollen when they feed on it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SugarFamewort.label: sugar famewort
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.description: Wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TallSlimyGrass.label: tall slimy grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.description: This strange plant seems to be of alien origins. It doesn't seem to be fit for human consumption. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TangleTea.label: tangle tea
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.description: This plant is completely alien. The blue nodules at the end of each branch / tentacle produce an eerie rattling sound from time to time. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TentacularPlant.label: tentacular aberration
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TinkleGrass.label: tinkle grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.description: This slimy bulb seems to be feeding on the polluted terrain like a parasite. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiBulb.label: toxibulb
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.description: A huge bioluminescent globular plant. Can be used as a natural sunlamp to grow regular plants, though the toxic environment it grows at might not be the best for cultivation. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicGamma.label: toxic gamma
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.description: Wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiGrass.label: toxi grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.description: A short toxin-adapted shrub with berries so unbelievably toxic that no animal would ever dare consume them. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeepingToxberry.label: weeping toxberry
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.description: This twisting alien plant grows small glowing berries. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WildRadagast.label: wild radagast
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.description: A small, ramified fungal colony with a pungent aroma. This one is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WitchesOyster.label: witches' oyster
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.descript: A broken mechanoid-band signal amplifier. Its antennas are bent in weird angles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBandNode.label: ancient band node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientBasicRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.descri: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientFaultyLamp.label: ancient faulty lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneAssembler.des: A workbench for creating implantable xenogerms from genepacks stored in nearby gene banks. This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.descript: This device was able to store genepacks and make them usable to create new xenogerms, when placed near a gene assembler. It has corroded beyond any repair, and the genepacks stored inside are far gone.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneBank.label: ancient gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneExtractor.des: An automated surgery machine that was able to extract a person's genes and create a genepack from them. Its internal machinery is completely fused and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGeneProcessor.des: A genetic analysis and processing system. Ruined and unuseable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.descrip: A vat of fluid which was able to gestate an embryo or accelerate a child's growth. Its transparent plasteel sheel has been smashed open, seemingly from the inside... Ominous.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientGrowthVat.label: ancient growth vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.descript: A huge gene bank, much larger than the ones in use nowadays. Completely broken.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientHugeBank.label: ancient huge gene bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLamp.label: ancient broken lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeMechGestator: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientLargeRecharger.de: A broken mech recharger. The connecting pins are bent and chipped, making the whole machine useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientMechGestator.desc: A tank used to create new mechanoids. The mechanite tank was punctured long ago, and all the fluid has long since evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientPollutionPump.des: This pump isn't going to pump anything at all anytime soon.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientShelf.label: ancient shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientSubcoreRipscanner: This thing is SO edgy. Like, SUPER edgy. Basically a medical bed with spikes. I bet it only worked if you played symphonic metal in the background. I blame Oskar.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientVitalsMonitor.des: A broken vitals monitor with a dead screen.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlphaGenesAncientWastepackAtomizer: This was just a fancy waste bin, and it is now just a broken waste bin.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.description: A bed specially designed for use in hospitals. The mattress has rotted away into nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHospitalBed.label: ancient hospital bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.description: A metallic post with a glass cilinder filled with some bioluminescent compound. It seems to have stopped producing light.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabLamp.label: ancient lab lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.description: This is a mote prop for "Atheism". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atheism.label: atheism
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJar.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarB.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarC.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.description: A decorative canopic jar. Well, you could stuff a fresh organ inside, but that'd be SO gross.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanopicJarD.label: canopic jar
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.description: This is a mote prop for "Cave paintings". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CavePaintings.label: cave paintings
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.description: This is a mote prop for "Cog". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cog.label: cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.description: A huge, decorative grog barrel. This one is completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EmptyGrogBarrel.label: empty grog barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.description: This is a mote prop for "Eye of Ra". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EyeOfHorus.label: eye of ra
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.description: A fake female mummy. The latest rage in decorating.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyFemale.label: fake mummy (f)
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyMale.description: A fake male mummy. The latest rage in decorating.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMummyMale.label: fake mummy (m)
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRelicAltar.description: A small bowl with capacity for one relic. Just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRelicAltar.label: relic altar
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticObelisk.label: futuristic obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.description: A truly colossal metallic structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticPyramid.label: futuristic great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuturisticStele.label: futuristic stele
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.description: A huge entrance for a kemetic city.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandGate.label: grand gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.description: A truly colossal stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GreatPyramid.label: great pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_JainSpire.description: This is a mote prop for "Jain spire". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_JainSpire.label: jain spire
LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.description: This is a mote prop for "Khanda". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Khanda.label: khanda
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.description: A large stone used to construct a prehistoric structure or monument, either alone or together with other stones, often hewn in definite shapes for special purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Megalith.label: megalith
LanguageData.VFEPD_Obelisk.description: This is a mote prop for "Obelisk". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Obelisk.label: obelisk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteA.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote A". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteA.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteB.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote B". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteB.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteC.description: This is a mote prop for "Scavenger Mote C". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScavengerMoteC.label: scavenger mote
LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.description: Arrrr, matey, this here be a mote prop for "Skull". Shiver me timber, this be intrinsically laggy, me lad, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation, ye scurvy sea dog.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Skull.label: skull
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.description: A gigantic stone structure whose outer surfaces are triangular and converge to a single step at the top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallPyramid.label: pyramid
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.description: A truly colossal statue of a sphinx, a mythical creature with the head of a human, and the body of a lion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sphinx.label: sphinx
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.description: This is a mote prop for "Star". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Star.label: star
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.description: A medieval sailing vessel characterized by a sturdy, broad-bottomed design with a single mast and a square-rigged sail. It was commonly used for trade, transportation, and exploration during the Middle Ages in Europe. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_AV_Cog.label: Cog
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.description: A two-masted sailing vessel with square rigging on both masts, typically carrying a fore-and-aft sail on the aftermast. Brigs were widely used for both naval and merchant purposes due to their combination of maneuverability and relatively large cargo capacity. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brig.label: Brig
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Caravel.label: Caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.description: A warship with a sleek design, fast and maneuverable, originally developed for escort and protection duties in the Age of Sail. Frigates usually feature a single continuous gun deck, carrying a mix of cannons and other armaments. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Frigate.label: Frigate
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.description: A large, multi-decked sailing ship primarily designed for transporting goods over long distances across oceans. It features a sturdy hull with ample cargo hold space, multiple masts rigged with square sails for propulsion, and a high stern and forecastle for additional cargo storage and crew quarters. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galleon.label: Galleon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.description: A junk ship is a traditional sailing vessel known for its unique design, featuring a high stern and a flat bottom. It often employs multiple sails and was historically used for various maritime activities such as trade, fishing, and transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Junk.label: Junk
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.description: A type of narrow and relatively long boat with a sleek design, often equipped with sails for propulsion. It is commonly used for various purposes such as transportation, exploration, and warfare throughout history. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Longship.label: Longship
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.description: A caravel is a small, fast, and versatile sailing ship known for its narrow hull, multiple masts, and combination of square and lateen sails. It was widely used for exploration, trade, and naval activities during the Age of Discovery. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_PirateCaravel.label: Pirate caravel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.description: A single-masted sailing vessel with a fore-and-aft rig, typically equipped with a mainsail and one or more headsails. Sleek and agile, sloops are versatile vessels used for various purposes such as racing, cruising, fishing, and coastal patrols. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Intended to be placed over water. Or wherever you want, I'm not your mom!
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sloop.label: Sloop
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.description: A lighter-than-air aircraft consisting of a bag, called an envelope, which contains heated air. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Balloon.label: Balloon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.description: A simple horse-driven cart that provides fast transportation. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horse is fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chariot.label: Chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.description: A horse-drawn four-wheeled vehicle used to transport people. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the horses are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoveredCarriage.label: Covered Carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.description: A sled pulled by four trained dogs used to travel over ice and through snow. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the dogs are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DogSled.label: Dog Sled
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.description: A primitive type of artillery designed to fire multiple rocket-powered iron-tipped arrows at once. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hwacha.label: Hwacha
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.description: A watercraft featuring a lateral support float known as an outrigger, which is fastened to one of the sides of the main hull. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OutriggerCanoe.label: Outrigger Canoe
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.description: A two wheeled cart pulled by oxen. A means of transportation used since ancient times, the ox cart is generally used to carry goods, such as agrarian produce or lumber. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed. Even the oxen are fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OxCart.label: Ox cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.description: A covered litter carried on poles on the shoulders of two bearers. A palanquin is not an efficient mode of transportation. Non-functional: its doors are sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Palanquin.label: Palanquin
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.description: A mode of human-powered transport by which a runner draws a two-wheeled cart which seats another person. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rickshaw.label: Rickshaw
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.description: The war chariot is a mobile archery platform operated by two people, with the driver steering the chariot with his reins while the main archer aims his bow and arrow at any targets within range. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarChariot.label: War chariot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.description: The wheelbarrow: Your trusty sidekick for moving stuff from 'point A' to 'point B' with all the pizzazz of a one-wheel parade float. Non-functional: all its internal mechanisms have been removed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheelbarrow.label: Wheelbarrow
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.description: A traffic management solution from long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientConcreteBarrier.label: ancient concrete barrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.description: A single-use pod for preserving one person in a state of suspended animation. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepPod.label: ancient cryptosleep pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.description: An ancient self-powered lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamp.label: ancient lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.description: Road lighting from long ago. No longer functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLamppost.label: ancient lamppost
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.description: A chunk of a scrapped spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScrapChunk.label: scrap ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.description: A chunk of a spacecraft. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipChunk.label: ship chunk
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPart.label: ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPartDefoliator.description: An ancient ship part. Upon closer inspection it seems to be made of painted cardboard.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipPartDefoliator.label: defoliator ship part
LanguageData.VFEPD_Urn.label: urn
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its internal power supply is completely depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDamagedSunlamp.label: damaged sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.descri: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDualHydroponicsBasin.label: ancient dual hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.descripti: An ancient nutrient solution dispenser that was used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientDispenser.label: ancient nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.description: An ancient nutrient solution pump. This pump has been damaged.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientPump.label: ancient nutrient pump
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionFermenter.d: An ancient nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientNutrientSolutionStorageTank: Ancient nutrient solution storage tanks. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.description: An ancient self-powered sun lamp. Its shell is sturdy, and it was powered by a thermonuclear battery, now depleted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSunlamp.label: ancient sun lamp
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.description: Fake bolts of cloth stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClothCrate.label: cloth crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydro.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroB.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.description: An ancient artificial nutrient bath for growing plants. Its core components have long been damaged and are now a pile of useless scrap iron.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DamagedHydroC.label: damaged ancient hydroponics
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.description: Fake bolts of devilstrand stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DevilstrandCrate.label: devilstrand crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.description: A nutrient solution dispenser used to process and convert nutrient ointments into nutrient solutions, and then transport nutrient solutions for hydroponic cultivation through a pipeline system. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientDispenser.label: nutrient solution dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.description: Steel nutrient pipes. These do not transport anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientPipes.label: nutrient pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.description: Fake boxes of nutrient solution stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionCrate.label: nutrient solution crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.descript: A nutrient solution fermenter used to process a series of raw food or fertilizers in a fermentation tank and separate them to obtain nutrient solution. Inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionFermenter.label: nutrient solution fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_NutrientSolutionStorageTank.label: nutrient solution storage tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateA.label: survival nutrient pack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.descrip: Fake boxes of survival nutrient paste packs stacked in a crate.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurvivalNutrientPackCrateB.label: survival nutrient pack crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.descri: The remains of what was an automatic drill designed for automatic ore extraction, once supported by a multitude of infrastructures. Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAutomaticDrillingRig.label: ancient automatic drilling rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.description: An ancient barrier gate that's no longer functioning properly.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrierGate.label: ancient barrier gate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.description: This large shotgun turret, badly damaged, is no longer usable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenTurret.label: ancient broken turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.descrip: Weathered electrical appliances once used in an ancient tunnel boring machines. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectricalEquipment.label: ancient electrical appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEmptyMiningCar.label: ancient empty mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.descri: A rusted bucket wheel of ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorBucketWheel.label: ancient excavator bucket wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExcavatorPowerFacilities.de: Torn power system of the ancient giant rock excavator. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.descript: The gigantic husk of what was a mountain-devouring mechanical beast, larger than most conventional buildings. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantRockExcavator.label: ancient giant rock excavator chassis
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.descript: An ancient fire hydrant with no water left inside.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientIndoorFireHydrants.label: ancient indoor fire hydrants
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.description: A torn ancient mineral conveyor once used for transporting minerals. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralConveyor.label: ancient mineral conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.description: A piece of ancient mineral outlet. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMineralExports.label: ancient mineral outlet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMudCarriage.description: A mining car loaded with mud.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMudCarriage.label: ancient mud carriage
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.descript: An ancient ore dressing machine. Non-functional
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOreDressingMachine.label: ancient ore dressing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlasteelMiningCars.descript: A mining car loaded with Plasteel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPlasteelMiningCars.label: ancient plasteel mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRockMiningCar.description: A mining car loaded with Rock.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRockMiningCar.label: ancient rock mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.descripti: An ancient truck stripped of any useful parts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruckMining.label: ancient rusted truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSemiTrailer.description: An old truck trunk filled with dirt.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSemiTrailer.label: ancient semi trailer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSteelMiningCars.description: A mining car loaded with Steel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSteelMiningCars.label: ancient steel mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTruckCompartment.descriptio: An old truck trunk filled with dirt.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTruckCompartment.label: ancient truck compartment
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelBoringMachine.descrip: The rusted, gigantic husk of an ancient tunnel boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelBoringMachine.label: ancient tunnel boring machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelStructuralSupport_a.d: A piece of ancient tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTunnelStructuralSupport_b.d: A piece of ancient tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumMiningCars.descripti: A mining car loaded with Uranium.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientUraniumMiningCars.label: ancient uranium mining car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AutomaticDrillingRig.description: The remains of what was an automatic drill designed for automatic ore extraction, once supported by a multitude of infrastructures. Missing most supporting infrastructures, and, most critically, its core components, it wouldn't function as of now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AutomaticDrillingRig.label: automatic drilling rig
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crosstie.description: A rail road crosstie placed under the railroad tracks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crosstie.label: crosstie
LanguageData.VFEPD_DiscardedRadiationSuit.label: discarded radiation suit
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalEquipment.description: Weathered electrical appliances used in a tunnel boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalEquipment.label: electrical appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeRail.label: fake rail
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralConveyor.description: A mineral conveyor used for transporting minerals. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralConveyor.label: mineral conveyor

LanguageData.VFEPD_MineralExports.label: mineral outlet

LanguageData.VFEPD_PickAxe.label: pickaxe
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shovel.label: shovel
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelBoringMachine.description: The gigantic husk of a boring machine. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelBoringMachine.label: tunnel boring machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_a.descript: A piece of tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_a.label: structural support
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_b.descript: A piece of tunnel support frame used to support tunnels during construction. Non-functional now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TunnelStructuralSupport_b.label: structural support
LanguageData.VFEPD_WarningBoard.label: warning board
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.description: An old, large battery commonly found in vaults, capable of sustaining the entire compound for a nearly infinite amount of time. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBattery.label: ancient battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.description: An old-fashioned metal bed frame with a hard mattress and uncomfortable duvet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBedTwo.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.description: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming biological material such as humans or animals. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBatteryTank.label: ancient bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBrokenDefensiveTurret.label: ancient broken defensive turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.descri: A destroyed platform for a turret.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBustedTurretPlatform.label: ancient busted turret platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientChemfuelPoweredGenerator.de: Produces a reliable stream of power by consuming chemfuel. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.description: An old, no longer operational computer desk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientComputerDesk.label: ancient computer desk
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.descri: An ancient medical pod that uses partial cryptosleep to slow down the degredation of wounds and help the body heal. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryptosleepSuspender.label: ancient cryptosleep suspender
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.description: A very old interactive machine that’s commonly used in the vaults to pass the time. This one is just deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEducator.label: ancient educator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.description: An old relic of the times, foosball table allows players to engage in the long forgotten game of football without leaving the safety of the vault. Or it would, but its rods are soldered and immobile.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFoosballTable.label: ancient foosball table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelTank.description: A large fuel tank that could be deconstructed for fuel. If it still had any.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelTank.label: ancient fuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeothermalPlant.description: Produces electricity from geothermal steam geysers. Or it would, if it was working.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeothermalPlant.label: ancient geothermal plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientInputTerminal.description: A station with buttons and levers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientInputTerminal.label: ancient input terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachinery.description: A set of old machine blocks. Their purpose, if they ever had any, has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachinery.label: ancient machinery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMonitorBank.description: A small set of old computer screens.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMonitorBank.label: ancient monitor bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShuttle.description: An ancient, no longer operational shuttle.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShuttle.label: ancient shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplySlingshot.description: Often found in ancient vaults, supply slingshot is a complex mechanism that catapults a supply crate across huge distances. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSupplySlingshot.label: ancient supply slingshot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransmitter.description: A transmitter used to send signals over long range. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTransmitter.label: ancient transmitter
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitor.description: An old set of monitors to check up on the healing progress of wounded soldiers. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVitalsMonitor.label: ancient vitals monitor
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWaterFilter.label: ancient water filter
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSupplyCrate.description: A large crate with some building resources and components. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LargeSupplyCrate.label: large hermetic crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_PipelineJunction.description: A large underground chemfuel pipeline. Not connected to anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PipelineJunction.label: pipeline junction
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBandNode.description: An ancient band node. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBandNode.label: ancient band node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBasicRecharger.description: An ancient basic recharger. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBasicRecharger.label: ancient basic recharger
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderCannon.descriptio: The remains of the back-mounted energy cannon of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderCannon.label: exostrider cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderHead.description: The remains of the head of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderHead.label: exostrider head
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderLeg.description: The remains of the leg of a massive, ancient exostrider mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderLeg.label: exostrider leg
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemains.descripti: The remains of a massive, ancient exostrider war mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemains.label: exostrider remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientExostriderRemainsPulseEffec: This is an effecter prop for "Ancient Exostrider Remains Pulse". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeMechGestator.descripti: An ancient large mech gestator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeMechGestator.label: ancient large mech gestator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechGestator.description: An ancient mech gestator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechGestator.label: ancient mech gestator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStandardRecharger.descripti: An ancient standard recharger. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStandardRecharger.label: ancient standard recharger
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxifierGenerator.descripti: An ancient toxifier generator. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToxifierGenerator.label: ancient toxifier generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_ApocritonPulseEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Apocriton Pulse". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ApocritonPulseEffect.label: apocriton pulse
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bloodfeed_WarmupEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Bloodfeed Warmup". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bloodfeed_WarmupEffect.label: bloodfeed warmup
LanguageData.VFEPD_CellPollutionEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cell Pollution". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CellPollutionEffect.label: cell pollution

LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonMegaspider.label: megaspider cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_CocoonSpelopede.label: spelopede cocoon
LanguageData.VFEPD_ControlMechEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Control Mech". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ControlMechEffect.label: control mech
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePoluxTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a polux tree. No pollution cleaning here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakePoluxTree.label: fake polux tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FilthAcid.label: acid
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_BurstEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Burst". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_BurstEffect.label: fire burst
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_SpewEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Spew". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fire_SpewEffect.label: fire spew
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlammableBile.description: Flammable bile. You know, a classic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FlammableBile.label: flammable bile
LanguageData.VFEPD_Floordrawing.description: Floor drawings. There is no better incentive to go child free in life.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Floordrawing.label: floor drawing
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasReleasingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gas Releasing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasReleasingEffect.label: gas releasing
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneAssembler_WorkingEffect.descri: This is an effecter prop for "Gene Assembler Working". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneAssembler_WorkingEffect.label: gene assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayGrass.description: This is just plastic grass painted gray. Gray? Grey? Can't you people just decide on one??
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrayGrass.label: gray grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanitorShip.description: A short-range ship used by a mechanitor to transport mechs for low-orbit or planetary travel. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechanitorShip.label: mechanitor ship
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandAntenna.label: mechband antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechBandAntennaPreparedEffect.desc: This is an effecter prop for "Mech Band Antenna Prepared". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandDish.description: A mech-band signaling device more powerful than the normal mechlink antenna. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechbandDish.label: mechband dish
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRepairingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Mech Repairing". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechRepairingEffect.label: mech repairing
LanguageData.VFEPD_PebbleCactus.description: A fake small cactus that resembles a cluster of pebbles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PebbleCactus.label: pebble cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_RatPalm.description: A fake tree similar to a palm tree with dense surface roots.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RatPalm.label: rat palm tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ripthorn.description: A fake short toxin-adapted shrub that looks like a dense, tough tangle of thorny branches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ripthorn.label: ripthorn
LanguageData.VFEPD_SanguophageMeetingEffect.descripti: This is an effecter prop for "Sanguophage Meeting". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SanguophageMeetingEffect.label: sanguophage meeting
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiPotato.description: A fake genetically-engineered variant of potato adapted for growing in polluted areas.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxiPotato.label: toxipotato plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeGrayPine.description: A fake small toxin-adapted tree with twisted branches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeGrayPine.label: gray pine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Vat_BubblesEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Vat Bubbles". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Vat_BubblesEffect.label: vat bubbles
This is an effecter prop for "Wastepack Atomizer Operating". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Witchwood.description: A fake small toxin-adapted tree with a twisted trunk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Witchwood.label: witchwood tree
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable cloth carpet border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Corner.label: carpet border corner
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Straight.description: A simple, paintable cloth carpet border.
LanguageData.VFE_CarpetBorder_Straight.label: carpet border
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable flagstone border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Corner.label: flagstone border corner
LanguageData.VFE_FlagstoneBorder_Straight.label: flagstone border
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable metal border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Corner.label: metal border corner
LanguageData.VFE_MetalBorder_Straight.label: metal border
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable stone border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Corner.label: stone border corner
LanguageData.VFE_StoneBorder_Straight.label: stone border
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable warning border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Corner.label: warning border corner
LanguageData.VFE_WarningBorder_Straight.label: warning border
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Corner.description: A simple, paintable wooden border. To be placed in the corner.
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Corner.label: wooden border corner
LanguageData.VFE_WoodenBorder_Straight.label: wooden border
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatDryingRack.description: A solid wooden rack featuring a series of dangling metal hooks across a central beam meant to hang slabs of meat. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MeatDryingRack.label: meat drying rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Poppy.description: A fake tiny, crimson flower that can be harvested for opium, a strong pain killing drug.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Plant_Poppy.label: poppy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.description: A small, personal tent no larger than a single person bed. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Tent.label: tent
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.description: A lightly decorated wooden stage meant to provide area for props and actors both to create compelling scenes. Purely decorative.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TheatreStage.label: theatre stage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.description: A very large, heated stone bath meant to be shared by several patrons. This one isn't heated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Thermaebath.label: thermaebath

LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.description: Aerodrone is a spacer-tech, unmanned aerial vehicle equipped with advanced sensors and a missile payload. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Aerodrone.label: aerodrone
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.description: A large, overcharged aerodrone battery. Non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneBatteryPack.label: aerodrone battery pack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.descriptio: A large military crate of aerodrone munitions. Upon closer inspection, all the missiles are fake plastic ones.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AerodroneMunitionsCrate.label: aerodrone munitions crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.description: A small-sized box containing autocannon ammunition. Used by Palintone turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Autocannon.label: autocannon ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.description: A small-sized box containing missiles. Used by Onager turrets to reload. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic missiles.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_Missile.label: missile ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.description: A small-sized box containing uranium slug ammunition. Used by Kontarion turrets to reload. May explode when damaged. Upon closer inspection this box seems to be just filled with plastic slugs.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmmoBox_UraniumSlug.label: uranium slug ammo box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing extremely valuable items. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosecuredCrate.label: biosecured crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.description: A deserter device capable of intercepting imperial communication. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnoutIntelScraper.label: burnout intel scraper
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.description: A spacer-tech shuttle designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeserterShuttle.label: deserter shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.description: A large fuel tank used to refuel Imperial shuttles. Completely empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FuelTank.label: fuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.description: The Imperial maxpack is a formidable armored transport truck, known for its impressive cargo capacity. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMaxpack.label: imperial maxpack
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.description: An advanced shielding apparatus. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialMegaHighShield.label: imperial mega high-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.description: An underground hydroponics basic used by the empire to feed their subjects. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water mains and all its plants are made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialUnderfarm.label: imperial underfarm
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.description: A small imperial crate containing valuables. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SupplyCrate.label: supply crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.descriptio: An imperial computer interface. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceDisplayBank.label: surveillance display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.description: A large pillar with a series of sensors, cameras and motion detectors. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillancePillar.label: surveillance pillar
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.description: A large console designed to link to surrounding surveillance pillars. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SurveillanceStation.label: surveillance console
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.description: A compact stack of discs crafted from the enigmatic element known as techite, produced exclusively by the Empire for knowledge transcribing. These are all blank.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TechiteDiscStack.label: techite disc stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.description: The Techprinter is a marvel of technological innovation, designed to capture and preserve the intricate knowledge residing within a techfriar’s mind. This one is disconnected from the grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Techprinter.label: techprinter
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.description: A large node connecting all the nearby water mains. Upon closer inspection it is disconnected from the water grid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterMain.label: water main
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.descriptio: A capacitor bank that transforms electricity into raw energy for the Zeus cannon. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonCapacitorBank.label: zeus cannon capacitor bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.descripti: This terminal serves as the primary interface for operating the Zeus Cannon batteries. Seems to be inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonControlStation.label: zeus cannon control station
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.description: A relic of ancient Sophiamundan technology, the Zeus Cannon is a closely guarded secret of the Empire. Wait, what is this? It's... made of cardboard!
LanguageData.VFEPD_ZeusCannonStatic.label: static zeus cannon
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BigFalseFire.label: big fake fire
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Bury Pawn". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BuryPawnEffect.label: bury pawn
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButcherMechanoidEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Butcher Mechanoid". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ButcherMechanoidEffect.label: butcher mechanoid
LanguageData.VFEPD_CleanEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Clean". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CleanEffect.label: clean
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClearSnowEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Clear Snow". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClearSnowEffect.label: clear snow
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructDirtEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Dirt". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructDirtEffect.label: construct dirt
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructMetalEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Metal". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructMetalEffect.label: construct metal
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructWoodEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Construct Wood". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConstructWoodEffect.label: construct wood
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cook". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookEffect.label: cook
LanguageData.VFEPD_CutStoneEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Cut Stone, Tailor, Smith and Sculpt", which share a similar effecter. Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CutStoneEffect.label: stone bits
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisabledByEMPEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Disabled by EMP". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisabledByEMPEffect.label: disabled by EMP
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrillEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Drill". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.

LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmoredImperialShuttle.description: A spacer-tech imperial gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmoredImperialShuttle.label: armored imperial shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialBanner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialBanner.label: imperial banner
LanguageData.VFEPD_ImperialShuttle.description: A spacer-tech imperial gunship designed for transit between surface and orbit, or between moons of a planetary system. This one seems to be non-functional.
