LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.description: A very efficient ancient battery. Sadly out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBioBattery.label: ancient microbiobattery
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateDouble.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.description: Whatever these crates contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCratePile.label: pile of ancient ruined crates
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrateTwo.label: ancient ruined crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.description: A super-charged air-conditioning unit designed for its intended purpose of preventing genomes from breaking down entropically. This one is non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCryofreezer.label: ancient cryofreezer
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.description: This device has collapsed in on itself, rendering it useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowomb.label: ancient electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.descriptio: The exterior shell has completely fallen apart, yet it seems that it exploded instead of imploded.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientElectrowombLarge.label: ancient large electrowomb
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGeneticsTinkeringTable.desc: Most of the useful and otherwise functional parts are missing, indicating intentional sabotage.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.description: Lacking proper maintenance for so long, this machine is rusted shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeExtractor.label: ancient genome extractor table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.descript: A very old recombinator that somehow possesses an awful stench and excessive mould.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomeRecombinator.label: ancient genome recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.description: A Genomorpher that has fallen into complete disrepair, some salvage still remains.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenomorpher.label: ancient genomorpher
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.description: Whatever this crate contained has long ago rotted and turned to dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTechCrate.label: ancient mechanized crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.description: The machinery and electronics are irreparable but could be broken down for scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTissueGrinder.label: ancient tissue grinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.description: This was once a smart table. But now it's dumb.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CommsTable.label: ancient comms table
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LabLockerBank.label: ancient lab locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.description: This tangle of decayed cables were probably once housed inside the ceiling panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LooseCables.label: loose cables
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.description: These monitors will never show any information again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MonitorBank.label: ancient monitor banks
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.description: This server rack once housed a lot of genetic information, but all its data has now degraded completely.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rack.label: ancient server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.descrip: A collapsed antenna that is completely unable of transmitting anything ever again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybrid_Antenna.label: ancient mechahybrid antenna
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.description: The broken maws of this ancient factory will never be able to close again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Ruined_Mechahybridizer.label: ancient mechahybridizer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.descriptio: This ancient tank once converted biological matter into an electrical current. It is now completely broken and useless.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientBioBattery.label: ancient ruined bio-battery tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAncientGeneTailoringPod.desc: This ancient structure was once used to inject nanomachines in a subject in an attempt to create the perfect soldier. It now lies rusted and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.description: It seems that this structure was capable of emitting some kind of electromagnetic radiation used to control brain function of certain animals. This was crude and primitive technology prone to failure and instability, and as such it is completely useless now.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalControlHub.label: ancient animal control hub
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.descr: Whatever was held inside this dank, rusted metal coffin has long since escaped. It is damaged beyond all repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedAnimalEnrichmentCenter.label: ancient animal enrichment center
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.descriptio: This deteriorated platform seems to have been used to assemble some kind of machinery. It now lays bare and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedArchotechPlatform.label: ancient construction platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedBarrelDouble.label: ancient ruined lab barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.description: This semi-spherical vat seems to have held some kind of viscuous liquid inside, as evidenced by the rancid-smelling residue coating its insides. It is now completely ruined and only useful as metal scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneDuplicator.label: ancient gene duplicator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.description: An ancient genepod that was used to combine genetic material. This machine is obsolete and damaged beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenePod.label: ancient ruined genepod
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.description: A completely obsolete model of gene recombinator, that is also deteriorated and rusted beyond and salvaging.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneRecombinator.label: ancient gene recombinator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.description: This ancient computer was used to storage genetic information and feed genetic dataprints to other machines, but its components have deteriorated so far that all the data it contained has degraded to nothingness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticDatabase.label: ancient genetic database
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.descr: Yet another workstation that has deteriorated beyond all recovery. A foul-smelling vial of stagnant liquid warns you to keep away from it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticExtractionTable.label: ancient genetic extraction table
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.description: This little wheeled table housed a small specialized computer and refrigerated trays to store genetic material, but it is now so damaged it can only be used as scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGeneticStorage.label: ancient genetic storage
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.description: A large centrifuge used in gene sequencing. Its corroded parts will never be of use to anyone again.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedGenomeSequencer.label: ancient genome sequencer
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedHexagelPlant.label: ancient hexagel core reactor
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.description: This small canister has been smashed to pieces and whatever it contained has long evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedIncubator.label: ancient ruined incubator
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.description: Whatever this barrel held has long ago evaporated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabBarrel.label: ancient ruined lab barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.description: Rusted shelving units coated in grime and dust.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedLabShelf.label: ancient lab shelf
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMechanoidTinkeringTable.desc: This workbench appears to have been used to try and reverse engineer mechanoid components, but it is damaged to the point of uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.descripti: A machine used to process mutagenic minerals, now completely broken and unsalvageable.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedMutaniteCentrifuge.label: ancient mutanite centrifuge
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.description: A slurry of liquefied organic pulp filled this reinforced glass vat. It now lays broken and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedNutrientVat.label: ancient nutrient vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.description: A weird-looking machine that shredded wood into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulper.label: ancient pulper
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.description: An obsolete, ancient machine that recycled wood, corpses and bones into organic pulp. Broken beyond repair.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedPulpRecycler.label: ancient pulp recycler
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.descriptio: These structural cryofuel coils have been completely ruined by time and neglect. They can no longer function.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedRefrigeratedCoils.label: ancient refrigerated coils
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.description: A metal sarcophagus used to grow bio-mechanic implants in a controlled manner. Its machinery has been gutted and has later decayed into rusted scrap.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedTissueGrowingVat.label: ancient tissue growing vat
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.description: Small canisters that once held some valuable liquids.
LanguageData.VFEPD_RuinedVials.label: ancient ruined vials
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignA.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignB.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignB.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignC.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignC.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignD.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignD.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignE.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignE.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignF.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignF.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignG.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignG.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignH.description: A weathered sign advertising a company that has long been forgotten.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SignH.label: ancient sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sink.label: ancient sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.description: A metallic capsule filled with some bioluminescent compound. Seems to be non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallBioLight.label: ancient bioluminescent light
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.description: Drinking from this will give you more than just a few rads...
LanguageData.VFEPD_Toilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.description: An ancient air conditioning machine. Its internals were smashed long ago and what wasn't looted has rusted away in the time since.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAirConditioner.label: ancient air conditioner
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.description: The remains of an ancient armored troop carrier which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientAPC.label: ancient ruined APC
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.description: An ancient ATM. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientATM.label: ancient ATM
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.description: An ancient, broken barrel that looks like it once contained waste of some sort. The only thing it contains now is a smear of dried sludge.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBarrel.label: ancient barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.description: An old, rotted mattress on a rusty frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientBed.label: ancient bed
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.description: An ancient console with an attached communications dish. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCommsConsole.label: ancient comms console
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.description: A large container from some ancient freight carrying vehicle. It has long since been looted and deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientContainer.label: ancient container
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained have degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientCrate.label: ancient crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.description: An ancient computer interface. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDisplayBank.label: ancient display bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.description: An ancient dropship engine. It probably came off a military troop carrier. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientDropshipEngine.label: ancient dropship engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEnemyTerminal.label: ancient enemy terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.description: A collection of ancient equipment blocks of unknown function. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientEquipmentBlocks.label: ancient equipment blocks
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.description: An ancient fence made of reinforced concrete posts joined by concrete panels.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFence.label: ancient fence
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.description: An ancient, depleted fuel node once used to charge machines with fuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientFuelNode.label: ancient fuel node
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.description: An ancient electrical generator. Its usable parts were smashed or looted long ago, and the rest has rusted into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGenerator.label: ancient generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.description: A giant wheel which came off some large vehicle many ages ago. The rubber has disintegrated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientGiantWheel.label: ancient giant wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.description: A self-powered hermetically-sealed crate for preserving valuable items. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHermetic.label: ancient hermetic crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.description: An ancient hydrant. Heavily rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientHydrant.label: ancient hydrant
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.description: An ancient jet engine, probably detached from a large airplane. Its delicate internals are rusted to uselessness, and the valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientJetEngine.label: ancient jet engine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.description: An ancient kitchen sink made of some non-metallic fiber-sheet material. It is badly deteriorated and there's no way to salvage anything from it.\n\nHow it got here must be a long story.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientKitchenSink.label: ancient kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.description: A large crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeCrate.label: ancient large crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLargeRustedEngineBlock.desc: A large, ancient engine block from some giant vehicle or power source. It's rusted through, and all the useful components are gone. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.description: An ancient, rusted bank of lockers. All of the lockers have been forced open with nothing valuable left behind.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLockerBank.label: ancient locker bank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.description: A long, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientLongCrate.label: ancient long crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.description: A large ancient machine case filled with unknown machinery. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMachine.label: ancient machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.description: The remains of a smashed mechanoid. All the useful components and materials are ruined or missing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDetritus.label: mechanoid detritus
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.description: The broken shell of a mech drop beacon. Its useful components are missing and the shell has deteriorated after many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMechDropBeacon.label: ancient mech drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.descriptio: A barrel from a long-range cannon for artillery or anti-ship use. When it was new, it must have been frighteningly powerful. Now, it's far beyond repair and every useful component has been looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonBarrel.label: ancient mega-cannon barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.descriptio: A mounting platform that once held some sort of cannon. It has been broken for many years and every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMegaCannonTripod.label: ancient mega-cannon platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.description: An ancient device for heating food. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMicrowave.label: ancient microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.description: An ancient, military-looking crate. It was broken long ago and any valuables it once contained were looted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMilitaryCrate.label: ancient military crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.descri: The shattered remains of an ancient sub-scale warsprinter. Whatever parts weren't ruined when it was destroyed were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientMiniWarwalkerRemains.label: ancient warsprinter remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.description: A table once used for surgical operations. It has long since deteriorated into uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOperatingTable.label: ancient operating table
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.description: An ancient oven. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientOven.label: ancient oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.description: A section from an ancient pipeline. It once carried some valuable fluid over long distances. Now it's been looted and deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipelineSection.label: ancient pipeline section
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.description: A bunch of rusted old pipes. It is hard to say how these ended up here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPipes.label: ancient pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.description: An ancient pod car once capable of automated flight. Its valuable parts were looted long ago, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPodCar.label: ancient pod car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.description: An ancient postbox, smashed and deteriorated to uselessness. It seems to have been moved here long ago for some unknown reason.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientPostbox.label: ancient postbox
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.description: A piece of ancient razor wire. It has been deteriorating for many years and no longer poses any danger.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRazorWire.label: ancient razor wire
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.description: An ancient refrigerator. It was stripped of interesting parts long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRefrigerator.label: ancient refrigerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.description: An ancient, broken car. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCar.label: ancient car
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.description: An ancient, rusted car frame. The body shell has long since rusted away to nothing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedCarFrame.label: ancient car frame
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.description: The remains of an ancient dropship. The valuable parts were looted long ago and the rest has deteriorated to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedDropship.label: ancient dropship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.descripti: An ancient engine block that is rusted through. No repair could salvage this.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedEngineBlock.label: ancient engine block
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.description: An ancient, broken troop carrier. Everything that isn't rusted away was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedJeep.label: ancient troop carrier
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.description: An ancient, broken truck. Everything useful either rusted away or was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientRustedTruck.label: ancient truck
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.description: A large self-powered hermetically-sealed crate with built-in security alarms. These can preserve their contents for a long time. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityCrate.label: ancient security crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.description: An ancient, broken security turret. The valuable parts have all been looted or smashed.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSecurityTurret.label: ancient security turret
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.description: An ancient, broken ship navigation beacon. Every useful component was looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShipBeacon.label: ancient nav beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.description: An ancient, rusted shopping cart. How exactly it got here is a mystery, but the story is long and probably quite sad.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientShoppingCart.label: ancient shopping cart
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.description: A small, empty crate which was abandoned ages ago. It's too rusted to store anything.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSmallCrate.label: ancient small crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.description: An ancient, broken crate. Any valuables it once contained were taken long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSpacerCrate.label: ancient spacer crate
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.description: An ancient device that looks like it once stored some kind of fluid. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStorageCylinder.label: ancient storage cylinder
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.description: An ancient stove. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientStove.label: ancient stove
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.description: An ancient rack unit packed with unidentifiable devices. Valuable parts are missing, and everything else is degraded to uselessness.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientSystemRack.label: ancient system rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.description: The remains of an ancient tank which was destroyed by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTank.label: ancient ruined tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.description: An defensive fortification for stopping vehicles. It's been deteriorating for many years.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTankTrap.label: ancient tank trap
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientTerminal.label: ancient terminal
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.description: An ancient toilet. Smashed long ago, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientToilet.label: ancient toilet
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.description: An ancient vending machine. It was smashed ages ago and generations of looters have taken every conceivably useful part. How it ended up here is a mystery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientVendingMachine.label: ancient vending machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.descriptio: The ruined remains of an ancient mid-scale warspider. It has been picked over many times, and there is nothing valuable left to loot.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarspiderRemains.label: ancient warspider remains
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.description: The assault claw of an ancient mid-scale warwalker. This weapon specialized in tearing through heavy plasteel armor at close range. Its valuable components were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerClaw.label: ancient warwalker claw
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.description: A massive foot from an ancient warwalker. It seems to have been torn free from its owner by some kind of heavy weapon. All the useful components were looted or deteriorated long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerFoot.label: ancient warwalker foot
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.description: The shattered leg of a mid-scale warwalker that fell here long ago. It has been picked clean by looters, and no valuable components remain.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerLeg.label: ancient warwalker leg
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.description: Most of the armored shell of a warwalker. It appears to have been torn off by some colossal weapon system. All the valuable parts were looted, and the rest is badly deteriorated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerShell.label: ancient warwalker shell
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.description: The torso of a mid-scale warwalker which fell here in ancient days. The valuable parts were looted long ago.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWarwalkerTorso.label: ancient warwalker torso
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.description: An ancient device used for washing textiles. Smashed and rusted, it is completely useless now.\n\nHow it got here is hard to say.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWashingMachine.label: ancient washing machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.description: An ancient wheel from some kind of vehicle. The rubber has deteriorated away and the metal is twisted and rusted.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AncientWheel.label: ancient wheel
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.description: A cardboard imitation of the central core of an archonexus.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchonexusCore.label: archonexus core
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.description: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArchotechTower.label: archotech tower
LanguageData.VFEPD_BiosculpterPod_OperatingEffect.des: This is an effecter prop for "Biosculpter Pod Operating". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Burnbong Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnbongSmokeEffect.label: burnbong smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.description: A celebratory tree decorated with ornaments and lights traditionally made as part of Christmas celebrations. Made of plastic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTree.label: christmas tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Christmas Tree Twinkle". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChristmasTreeTwinkleEffect.label: christmas twinkle
LanguageData.VFEPD_DriedBlood.label: dried blood
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.description: This fake pot is similar to those used for planting bonsai trees. Colonists will not plant anything here, so you can put a fake flower on top.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBonsaiPot.label: bonsai pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as gauranlen moss. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenMoss.label: fake gauranlen moss
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.description: Plastic tree imitating a gauranlen tree. No dryads here.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGauranlenTree.label: fake gauranlen tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.description: A fake gibbet cage with nothing inside. Sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeGibbetCage.label: fake gibbet cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.description: This is just smoke and mirrors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FalseBlueFire.label: fake darkfire
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.description: A fake inedible, fibrous plant which usually produces a small amount of a wood-like substance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fibercorn.label: fibercorn
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Fire Smoke". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FireSmokeEffect.label: fire smoke
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Debris". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenDebrisEffect.label: gauranlen debris
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.descrip: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves, Batch". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesBatchEffect.label: gauranlen leaves, batch
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Gauranlen Leaves". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GauranlenLeavesEffect.label: gauranlen leaves
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a grand archotech structure of towering height and impressive bulk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrandArchotechStructure.label: grand archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hacking". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HackingEffect.label: hacking
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Hair Cutting". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_HairCuttingEffect.label: hair cutting
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.descriptio: A cardboard imitation of a large archotech structure.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MajorArchotechStructure.label: major archotech structure
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.description: This is an effecter prop for "Making Skylantern". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MakingSkylanternEffect.label: making skylantern
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.description: This is NOT the latest fashion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MoldyUniform.label: ragged uniform
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Rays". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowRays.label: ritual glow rays
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.descripti: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Glow Single Ray". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualGlowSingleRay.label: glow single ray
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line A". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineA.label: tech lines A
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line B". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineB.label: tech lines B
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.description: This is a mote prop for "Ritual Tech Line C". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RitualTechLineC.label: tech lines C
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.description: This is a mote prop for "Role Pawn Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePawnHighlight.label: role pawn highlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.descrip: This is a mote prop for "Role Position Highlight". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_RolePositionHighlight.label: role position
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.description: This is a mote prop for "Spike Pipe". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_SpikePipe.label: spike pipe
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.description: This is a mote prop for "Totem outline". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Mote_TotemOutline.label: totem
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.description: A fake meaty bioengineered mushroom grown for its nutritious value.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Nutrifungus.label: nutrifungus
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.description: If these appear under your car, take it to a mechanic.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OilSmear.label: oil smear
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.description: I picture it tasting like Tang.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PodSlime.label: pod slime
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.description: Don't seem to contain any important information.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ScatteredDocuments.label: scattered documents
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.descr: This is an effecter prop for "Sleep Accelerator Active". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SleepAcceleratorActiveEffect.label: sleep accelerator
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceDrone.label: space drone
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.description: A fake tall brown mushroom with a long stem.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Timbershroom.label: timbershroom
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.description: A fake tree, pruned and shaped to look visually pleasing.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TreeBonsai.label: bonsai tree

LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGreen.label: green barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelGrey.label: grey barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelRed.label: red barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BarrelYellow.label: yellow barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.description: A black bag containing various sort of rubbish.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BinBag.label: bin bag
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.description: A large wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxLarge.label: large wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.description: A small wooden box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BoxSmall.label: small wooden box
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrickPile.label: brick pile
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.description: A large cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxLarge.label: large cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.description: A small cardboard box with various content.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CardboardBoxSmall.label: small cardboard box
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.description: A large stack of concrete bags.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ConcreteBags.label: concrete bags
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cone.label: cone
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.description: A blue metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerBlue.label: blue cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.description: A green metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGreen.label: green cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.description: A grey metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerGrey.label: grey cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.description: A red metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerRed.label: red cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.description: A yellow metal cargo container. Impassable. Cannot hold roof.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ContainerYellow.label: yellow cargo container
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.description: A small metal cabinet containing electrical circuits and fuses.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricalCabinet.label: electrical cabinet
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasTank.label: gas tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.description: A metal locker unit, allowing workers to store valuable belongings.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Lockers.label: lockers
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pallet.label: pallet
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.description: A blue metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelBlue.label: pallet with blue barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.description: A green metal barrels on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGreen.label: pallet with green barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.description: A grey metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelGrey.label: pallet with grey barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.description: A red metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelRed.label: pallet with red barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.description: A yellow metal barrel on a wooden pallet.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBarrelYellow.label: pallet with yellow barrels
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.description: A large pallet with several wooden boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletBoxes.label: pallet with wooden boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.description: A large pallet with several cardboard boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalletCardboard.label: pallet with cardboard boxes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.description: A large stack of industrial pipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Pipes.label: stack of pipes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.description: A large stack of wooden planks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Planks.label: stack of planks
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.description: An exhaust to a ventilation system.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VentilationShaft.label: ventilation shaft
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterTank.label: water tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.description: This doesn't even glow! I want to speak with the manager!
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.label: fake glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hive.label: fake hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.description: A decorative space hive. Won't produce any insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.label: space hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrewingBarrel.label: brewing barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cooker.label: cooker
LanguageData.VFEPD_CookingAppliances.label: cooking appliances
LanguageData.VFEPD_CuttingBoard.label: cutting board
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.description: A simple dinner set containing all the required utensils.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DinnerSet.label: dinner set
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.description: A four wheeled trolley for empty plates and food trays.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FoodTrolley.label: food trolley
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.description: A large fridge with an in-built freezer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Fridge.label: fridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSink.label: kitchen sink
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.description: A simple kitchen surface with a cutting board.
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurface.label: kitchen surface
LanguageData.VFEPD_KitchenSurfaceEmpty.label: kitchen surface empty
LanguageData.VFEPD_Knives.label: knives
LanguageData.VFEPD_Microwave.label: microwave
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.description: A sterile mop bucket. Ideal for a mop.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MopBucket.label: mop bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_Oven.label: oven
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.description: A wide assortment of different spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_Spices.label: spices
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.description: A large, standing fresh water dispenser.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WaterDispenser.label: water dispenser
LanguageData.VFEPD_WineRack.label: wine rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.description: A timed mechanoid activation unit. After counting down, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Activator.label: activator
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.description: A proximity alarm for dormant mechanoids. If it detects a human-like threat nearby, it will... do nothing... Welp.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ActivatorProx.label: activator proximity
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.description: An ultratech device for controlling climate. Using chemicals and exotic fields to manipulate the atmosphere, it shifts the temperature in this region of the world. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ClimateAdjuster.label: climate adjuster
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.description: An area-denial device which annihilates nearby plants without affecting animals. Permanently out of order.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Defoliator.label: inactive defoliator
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.description: A massive electromagnetic interference generator. It interferes with or shuts down electrical devices in nearby regions. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EMIDynamo.label: EMI dynamo
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.description: A self-powered mechanoid node of unknown function. Deactivated.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Gloomlight.label: deactivated gloomlight
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.description: An automated mechanoid factory. Deactivated and sealed shut.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechAssembler.label: mech assembler
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Sealed shut and inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsule.label: mech capsule
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.description: A mechanoid storage and deployment capsule. Open and empty.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechCapsuleOpen.label: mech capsule, open
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.description: A mechanoid reinforcement drop beacon. When activated, it does nothing, because it's not real. Imaginary mechanoids can't hurt you.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MechDropBeacon.label: drop beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.description: An archotech device transmitting the thoughts of a mad superintelligence. It generates a massive psychic drone tuned to one gender and affecting a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicDroner.label: psychic droner
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.description: An archotech device that generates a massive psychic suppression field tuned to a particular gender. People of that gender have their psychic activity suppressed, reducing their consciousness. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PsychicSuppressor.label: psychic suppressor
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGenerator.label: fake shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.description: A shielding device which projects a momentum repulsor field. Or it would, it it wasn't so fake.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShieldGeneratorLow.label: fake low-shield
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. By harvesting available compounds and converting them into self-reproducing opaque molecules, it can spew enough smoke to block the sun in a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmokeSpewer.label: smoke spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.description: An ultratech machine that generates a sheet of exotic fields at high altitude, turning the sky opaque and blocking the sun. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SunBlocker.label: sun blocker
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.description: An ultratech weapon of mass destruction designed for area denial. This device harvests available compounds and converts them into self-reproducing poisons. By spewing these into the atmosphere, it can poison a whole region of the planet. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicSpewer.label: toxic spewer
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.description: A fake mechanoid power generation unit. It won't output any power.
LanguageData.VFEPD_UnstablePowerCell.label: fake power cell
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.description: An ultratech device for controlling weather. Using chemicals and exotic fields, it forces the weather into a particular configuration. Looking inside, you'll discover it's actually a cardboard cutout without any relevant machinery.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeatherController.label: weather controller
LanguageData.VFEPD_Anvil.label: anvil
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.description: An armor stand. There is currently no armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandEmpty.label: empty armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.description: An armor stand. There is a suit of plate armor mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArmorStandFull.label: full armor stand
LanguageData.VFEPD_ArrowCage.label: arrow cage
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.description: A decorative banner hanging from a vertical wooden frame.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Banner.label: banner
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.description: A bowl-shaped furnishing used to hold a fire.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BrazierEmpty.label: empty brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketEmpty.label: empty bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.description: A wooden bucket filled with water.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BucketwithWater.label: water bucket
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.description: A metal cage shaped empty brazier.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CageBrazier.label: cage brazier
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.description: A cage platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CagePlatform.label: cage platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.description: A tanning rack with a pelt mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TanningRack.label: tanning rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.description: A long weapon rack. There aren't any weapons on it at the moment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackEmpty.label: empty weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of spears mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSpears.label: spears weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.description: A long weapon rack. There is a selection of swords mounted on it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WeaponRackSwords.label: sword weapon rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChest.label: wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenChestLarge.label: large wooden chest
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.description: A wooden platform to walk on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenPlatform.label: wooden platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.description: A tall post with signs pointing in different directions.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WoodenSign.label: wooden sign
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.label: fake bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.description: This is not made of snow, but a very fake looking polyurethane foam.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.label: fake snowman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.description: This is just a shallow hole with a tiny device spewing tepid, misted water. Provides no heat or energy, but looks cool.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.label: fake steam geyser
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.description: A festive present. Actually just a painted cardboard box. Booooh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.label: present
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.description: A fake, enormous purple mushroom. Its size and glowing protrusions make this fungus beautiful to look at.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agarilux.label: agarilux
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.description: A fake, large-leafed desert plant with edible flowers and stalks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Agave.label: agave
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.description: A fake tropical plant. Its extremely broad leaves are a commonly-recognized signifier of tropical forests.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Alocasia.label: alocasia
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.description: A fake, fast-growing tree-like plant that grows in dense groves. Bamboo can be harvested for a wood-like material. The plant itself is not beautiful.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BambooTree.label: bamboo tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.description: A fake bushy wild plant which yields delicious berries. Berries can be cooked, but they're also good to eat even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BerryBush.label: berry bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.description: A fake temperate-biome tree known for its thin, white, paper-like bark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BirchTree.label: birch tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.description: Fake, tangled, thorny, woody shoots covered with leaves. Brambles grow in clusters, and slow down anyone moving over them.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Brambles.label: brambles
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.description: A fake blue moss typically found in deep, dark caves. It is sticky, with tangled fibers, which slows anyone walking over it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bryolux.label: bryolux
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.description: A fake burned tree stump. It's ugly and yields no usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_BurnedTree.label: burned tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.description: A fake, short shrub. Does not typically talk.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bush.label: bush
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.description: One of the most common rainforest trees. Cecropia grows very fast, but yields little usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CecropiaTree.label: cecropia tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.description: A fake, tangled masses of cord-like, spiky vines which coil in great masses along the ground. Chokevine greatky slows down anyone who moves over it. Multiple tribes have independently generated stories of chokevine strangling children to death in the night, as a way to scare kids into coming home before dark.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Chokevine.label: chokevine
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.description: An unusual plant with tall, pretty flowers. Some call it the 'bush lily'.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Clivia.label: clivia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.description: A fake tall grain plant which produces ears of soft, edible seeds. While corn takes a long time to grow, it yields lots of food compared to other crops. Harvested corn takes a long time to spoil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Corn.label: corn plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.description: A fake mid-size crop that yields fine white cotton fibers. These are used to make cloth.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cotton.label: cotton plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.description: A fake, tall coniferous tree often found in swamps. Despite its slow growth, planting these trees can be profitable as a low-effort, long-term investment because they yield so much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CypressTree.label: cypress tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.description: A cultivated fake flower with wide petals and a short lifespan. Daylilies are very beautiful, but must be replanted often.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Daylily.label: daylily
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.description: This fake fragile mushroom was genetically engineered to produce a silk net that is both difficult to tear and soft to the touch. While the mushroom takes a very long time to grow, only exotic ultra-tech fabrics outperform its devilstrand fibers.\n\nSome say it's called devilstrand because of its red color. Others think it owes its name to the greed it inspires in people.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Devilstrand.label: devilstrand
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.description: A fake, hardy desert tree topped with thick, pointed leaves.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DragoTree.label: drago tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.description: A fake small brown mushroom typically found in caves. It smells like an old, dirty rag pulled from the stomach of a rotting muffalo - but it tastes surprisingly good when cooked.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Glowstool.label: glowstool
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.description: Fake wild tall grass. Slows down anyone moving over it..
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassLong.label: long grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.description: Fake wild grass. Grows anywhere there is a little light and minimally fertile ground.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GrassShort.label: short grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.description: A fake mixture of nutrient-rich grasses which yield large amounts of hay. Hay is edible for animals, but not humans.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Haygrass.label: haygrass
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.description: A fake, slow-growing plant which yields herbal medicine when harvested. Sowing and harvesting healroot are both very labor-intensive tasks because of its delicate shoots.\n\nHealroot was selectively bred for centuries by settlers. It is sometimes also called "healer's hand" by tribespeople - a nickname it owes to its five major medicinal virtues.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Healroot.label: healroot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.description: A fake flowering crop that yields hops, an essential ingredient in beer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hops.label: hop plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.description: A fake, common medium-sized tree, easily identifiable by its distinct three-pointed leaf.
LanguageData.VFEPD_MapleTree.label: maple tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.description: A fake hardwood tree. Oaks take a long time to grow, but their wood is so strong that 'oak' is used as a metaphor for strength across many cultures.
LanguageData.VFEPD_OakTree.label: oak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.description: A fake tropical tree with a tall, naked trunk topped by a cluster of very broad leaves. Unfortunately, this variety doesn't produce any edible coconuts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PalmTree.label: palm tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.description: A fake short cactus. It is so named because it resembles a pincushion.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PincushionCactus.label: pincushion cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.description: A fake large conifer covered with prickly pine cones. It grows in a distinctive conical shape.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PineTree.label: pine tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.description: A fake softwood tree that grows very fast. Unfortunately, its wood is weak and so it yields less useful material than hardwood trees.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PoplarTree.label: poplar tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.description: A fake, highly nutritious tuber. Potatoes grow well even in somewhat poor soil, and form a delicious crispy outer coating when fried in oil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Potato.label: potato plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.description: A fake leafy plant which generates the chemical compound psychite. Originally evolved as a defense mechanism to ward off plant-eating animals by overstimulating and sickening them, the psychite drug can be extracted and refined into various forms for recreational use. It is addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Psychoid.label: psychoid plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.description: A rare, giant flower which can be found deep in steaming jungles. You would think a giant flower would be beautiful, but this one looks and smells like rotting flesh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rafflesia.label: giant rafflesia
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.description: A fake, short, fast-growing crop that yields small edible grains. Its great nutritional ouput and ease of cultivation has made it the economic core of many great civilizations. While rice grows quickly, it is sensitive to soil fertility and will not fare well in poor soil.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rice.label: rice plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.description: A fake beautiful cultivated flower, the rose has been a symbol of love since Earth's ancient era.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rose.label: rose
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.description: A fake, large cactus native to arid Earth environments. Though it is not a tree, it yields a small amount of fibrous material that can be used like wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SaguaroCactus.label: saguaro cactus
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.description: A fake leafy crop grown for the psychological effects of chemicals in its leaves. Smokeleaf leaves can be prepared into joints at the crafting spot. Smokeleaf makes a user feel relaxed, but reduces motivation, and can be addictive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Smokeleaf.label: smokeleaf plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.description: A fake, low bush-like plant that yields fragile but delicious strawberries. While it isn't quite as productive calorie-for-calorie as other crops, strawberries are delicious even when raw.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Strawberry.label: strawberry plant
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.description: A fake, exceptionally strong hardwood tree that grows in warm climates. Because teak wood is so durable and water-resistant, it was used to form the keel of wooden sailing ships in ancient times.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TeakTree.label: teak tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.description: One of the fastest growing shade trees, fake willows provide a beautiful, leafy canopy. It doesn't yield much usable wood.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WillowTree.label: willow tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_AdvancedRotor.label: advanced rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.description: A simple device that stores power. This one is out-of-service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Battery.label: battery
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.description: A large tank filled with explosive chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank.label: large chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_CoalBurner.label: coal burner
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.description: An exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Exhaust.label: exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.description: An industrial style gas storage unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GasStorageUnit.label: gas storage unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_Generator.label: generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.description: A large part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitLarge.label: generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.description: A small part of an industrial generator unit.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GeneratorUnitSmall.label: small generator unit
LanguageData.VFEPD_IndustrialGenerator.label: industrial generator
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.description: A large tank filled with water-based liquid.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LiquidTank.label: large liquid tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerConverter.label: power converter
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.description: A tall post to mount cables on.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PowerPole.label: power pole
LanguageData.VFEPD_Rotor.label: rotor
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.description: A small exhaust port for the fumes of industrialism.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SmallExhaust.label: small exhaust
LanguageData.VFEPD_SteelTank.label: large steel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.description: A small barrel of toxic waste.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ToxicWasteBarrel.label: toxic waste barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.description: A decorative drape. This will not satisfy any noble requirements, as it is just for decorative purposes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DrapeProp.label: decorative drape
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.description: Plastic grass painted in the same colour as anima grass. Probably terrible for the environment.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaGrass.label: fake anima grass
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.description: Plastic tree imitating an anima tree. Doesn't provide any sort of psychic powers.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeAnimaTree.label: fake anima tree
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.description: Marks the corner of a landing area. Shuttles will ignore this one as it is inactive.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShipLandingBeacon.label: landing beacon
LanguageData.VFEPD_Shuttle.label: shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_ShuttleCrashed.label: crashed shuttle
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.description: An advanced data console accepting several different types of file formatting.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConsole.label: data console
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.description: A large box holding cables and pipes for data transfer.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DataConveyor.label: data conveyor
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayScreen.label: display screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.description: A large size display screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DisplayTable.label: display table
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.description: A long console with several different command modules.
LanguageData.VFEPD_LongCommandConsole.label: long command console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.description: A small, futuristic personal communications console.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PersonalConsole.label: personal console
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.description: A glass screen, ideal for planning out combat scenarios.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningScreen.label: planning screen
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.description: A large size planning screen mounted on a large table.
LanguageData.VFEPD_PlanningTable.label: planning table
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.description: A small platform containing a variety of sensors.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SensorPlatform.label: sensor platform
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.description: A large server rack, containing multiple hard drives and advanced computer components.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ServerRack.label: server rack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.description: A medium sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainer.label: spacer container
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.description: A large sized, triple sealed, password protected box.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerLarge.label: spacer container large
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.description: A large stack of different sized, triple sealed, password protected boxes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerContainerStack.label: spacer container stack
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.description: A large, multi-chamber advanced storage device.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpacerStorage.label: advanced storage device
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.description: A medium sized panel containing varius levers and switches.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SwitchPanel.label: switch panel
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.description: A large dashboard with several display screens, for up-to-date information on all mod releases.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TripleDisplay.label: triple display dashboard
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlack.label: black gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossBlue.label: blue gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossRed.label: red gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossSilver.label: silver gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.description: A large, multi-personel transport ship currently out of service.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AlbatrossWhite.label: white gunship
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlack.label: black skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipBlue.label: blue skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipRed.label: red skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipSilver.label: silver skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.description: A light-weight, out-of-service skip, allowing users to travel comfortably for a short distance.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SkipWhite.label: white skip
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.description: A large, out-of-service, multi use drop pod.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Superpod.label: superpod
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.description: A gilded distillery of very delicate craftsmanship meant for aging ambrosia must into a drinkable form. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AmbrandyDistillery.label: ambrandy distillery
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.description: A somewhat ornate countertop stocked to the brim with different vessels and devices for making a variety of drinks.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bar.label: decorative bar
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.description: An all-in-one soda manufacturing unit. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DecorativeSodaFountain.label: soda fountain
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.description: A fully metal industrial distilling device, meant to purify and ferment gin into a drinkable form. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_GinStill.label: gin still
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.description: A small still and fermenter combo unit. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_TequilaBarrel.label: tequila barrel
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.description: A cheap container meant for storing water retrofitted to be air tight for short-term fermenting. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_VodkaDrum.label: vodka drum
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.description: A huge barrel meant for aging a high volume of whiskey at once. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_WhiskeyCask.label: whiskey cask
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.description: An espresso machine brews coffee by forcing pressurized water near boiling point through a "puck" of ground coffee and a filter in order to produce a thick, concentrated coffee called espresso. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EspressoMachine.label: espresso machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.description: An industrial liquid storage tank meant for storing chemfuel. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ChemfuelTank_VCE.label: chemfuel tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.description: A heavy industrial sludge storage tank meant for storing deepchem delivered via deepchem pipe network. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepchemTank.label: deepchem tank
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.description: A fake, anomalous, leafy vine bearing tiny unpalatable green fruits. When ground finely during cooking the fruits release a complex, peppery flavor, perfect for spicing dishes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Allspice.label: allspice
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.description: A canning machine is an appliance to store preserved food inside metallic cans. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CanningMachine.label: canning machine
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.description: A cheese press is a device for pressing whey from curds when making cheese. This one is empty and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CheesePress.label: cheese press
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare condiments used in gourmet recipes.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CondimentPrepTable.label: decorative condiment table
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.description: A deep fryer is a kitchen appliance used for deep frying. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DeepFrier.label: deep fryer
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.description: An electric pot, also called a thermo pot, is a small appliance used for boiling water and maintaining it at a constant temperature. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_ElectricPot.label: electric pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.description: A grill is a device that cooks food by applying heat from below. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grill.label: grill
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.description: A fake, thick, tall, tropical grass with jointed stems. While not exactly the most nutritious thing to eat on its own, this genetically modified sugarcane is easily milled into sugar and then used for a variety of culinary creations - Particularly desserts.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Sugarcane.label: sugarcane
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.description: A fake, amber cereal plant that takes almost an entire growing season to come to fruition. While fragile and time-consuming, this wheat has been genetically engineered to gently break into flour with a mere touch.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Wheat.label: wheat
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.description: A wood-fired stove with a top side perfectly indented for a large pot. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_StewPot.label: stew pot
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.description: A soy fermenter is a cilindrical, metallic drum where soybeans are pressed, mixed with aspergillus bacteria and grain, and aged for long time periods. This one is inactive and non-functional.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SoyFermenter.label: soy sauce fermenter
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.description: A working table to cut, slice and prepare all kinds of sushi.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SushiPrepTable.label: sushi prep table
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMetalBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeMetalBridge.label: fake metal bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeStoneBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeStoneBridge.label: fake stone bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.description: This is a mote prop for "Atom Symbol". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Atom.label: atom symbol
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.description: This is a fleck prop for "Authoritarian star". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_AuthStar.label: authoritarian star
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulb.description: This is a fleck prop for "Bulb". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Bulb.label: bulb
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crescent.description: This is a fleck prop for "Crescent". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Crescent.label: crescent
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cross.description: This is a fleck prop for "Cross". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Cross.label: cross
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalBall.description: This is a mote prop for "Crystal Ball". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_CrystalBall.label: crystal ball
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarA.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star A". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarA.label: divination star A
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarB.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star B". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarB.label: divination star B
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarC.description: This is a fleck prop for "Divination Star C". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_DivinationStarC.label: divination star C
LanguageData.VFEPD_EldritchRune.description: This is a mote prop for "Eldritch Rune". Intrinsically laggy, though less than effecter props. Use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_EldritchRune.label: eldritch rune
LanguageData.VFEPD_FallingMeteor.description: This is a fleck prop for "Falling Meteor". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FallingMeteor.label: falling meteor
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galaxy.description: This is a fleck prop for "Galaxy". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Galaxy.label: galaxy
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grapes.description: This is a fleck prop for "Grapes". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Grapes.label: grapes
LanguageData.VFEPD_Graph.description: This is a fleck prop for "Graph". Intrinsically laggy, use in moderation.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Graph.label: graph
